channel.title: Posts on Sanaz
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Sanaz
channel.item:
http://localhost:1313/posts/newfile/ Mon, 01 Jan 0001 00:00:00 +0000 http://localhost:1313/posts/newfile/ How to Set Up a Network: A Practical Guide In this tutorial, we will cover the step-by-step process of setting up a network in a practical environment. we are in a room with three nodes, and the cables for these nodes have already been laid. We will connect the client nodes to a server room where a patch panel is installed. Below is a clear, structured guide to achieve this. =======
Posts on VPN Setup Tutorial //localhost:1313/posts/ Recent content in Posts on VPN Setup Tutorial Hugo en Tue, 21 Jan 2025 12:00:00 +0000
VPN Setup Tutorial //localhost:1313/posts/vpn-setup-tutorial/ Tue, 21 Jan 2025 12:00:00 +0000 //localhost:1313/posts/vpn-setup-tutorial/ VPN Setup Tutorial: A Practical Guide This tutorial guides you through setting up a secure VPN using WireGuard. Prerequisites AWS Server (Ubuntu). Ubuntu Client. Linux Command Knowledge. Steps Launch an AWS EC2 Instance. Install WireGuard on the Server and Client. Configure the server with the required keys. Test the VPN using curl ifconfig.me. Enjoy secure, encrypted connections!
Network Lab: How to Set Up a Network //localhost:1313/posts/network-lab/ Tue, 15 Sep 2020 11:30:03 +0000 //localhost:1313/posts/network-lab/ How to Set Up a Network: A Practical Guide In this tutorial, we will cover the step-by-step process of setting up a network in a practical environment. Network Components Overview Nodes: Devices connected to the network. Patch Panel: Organizes and manages cables in the server rack. Cables: Pre-laid cables running from client nodes to the server room. Keystone Jack: Used for terminating cables. Rack: Structure holding the patch panel. Key Observations Cables converge in the server room and connect via the patch panel. >>>>>>> 102c1dc (Deploy website)
